calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-13-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq. for Plaintiff/Cross Defendant Sylvia Sabel, executrix for Estate of Bert Sabel, present was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff's Exhibit 1: Declaration by Mr. Feinberg------------ID/EVID
2: Settlement agreement-------------------ID/EVID
3: Cash receipt $5,000.00 dtd. 9-10-01----ID/EVID
4: Cash receipt $2,9070.00 dtd. 9-24-01.--ID/EVID
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff/Cross Defendant and against the Defendants/Cross Complainant: Fidelity Title, a Corp., Larry Snow and Fidelity National Title Company, a California Corp. See scanned 3 pg Judgment for complete details. Counsel stipulated for the return of the exhibits in open court, and to prepare Judgment.
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan on Jan. 13, 2004.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2003 Set For Trial On Jan-05-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-17-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 602

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Continued To Jan-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Andrew Dimitriou, Esq., for Plaintiff: Sylvia Sabel Executrix for Estate of Bert Sabel.
No appearance by the Defendant: Fidelity Title Corp.
10:15 a.m. - Counsel present without the case file.
This matter is continued to Jan. 13, 2004 at 09:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for Prove-Up Hearing.
